title: CallLint Policy Decision
description: The deterministic verdict (calllint.decision.v0) computed over an Authority Manifest under a policy. Object 4 of the six. Binds the artifact, authority, and policy digests so a receipt can prove WHAT was decided over WHICH authority under WHICH policy. Core rule - Evidence != Decision: external evidence may add reasons or tighten completeness, but never sets the verdict alone, and a degraded/failed external scan never yields SAFE. Fully deterministic; digest = sha256 over this object minus its own digest field. See ADR 0035 / 0036.

artifactDigest.description: Object-1 digest. null only when decided over an unpinned target.

authorityDigest.description: Object-3 digest. Binds the exact capability inventory decided over.

policyDigest.description: Digest of the policy applied (hashJson over the Policy object).

evidenceDigests.description: Digests of external evidence factored in (sorted, deduped). Provenance only - evidence never sets the verdict alone.

verdict.description: The deterministic verdict. UNKNOWN (insufficient evidence) outranks REVIEW and never reads as a pass.

evidenceSource.description: Provenance for this reason (the capability's evidenceSource). Never empty.

contributes.description: Verdict this reason contributes on its own, before aggregation.

requiredApprovals.description: Normalized approval labels this decision would require before apply (sorted, deduped).

unknowns.description: Gaps that kept the decision from being fully grounded, so silence never reads as SAFE.

completeness.description: Whether the decision was made over complete authority + evidence, or partial.

digest.description: sha256 over this object minus its own digest field (hashJson).
